title: Novo Mesto Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Novo Mesto with a Z-Score of -3.00. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Novo Mesto are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The high humidity level of 83% and moderate wind speed of 9.8 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 11.5 GG indicates a high energy demand to maintain comfortable temperatures.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to frost
